title: Mars' Moderate Modpack
description: A modpack intended to offer a moderately modded experience without requiring a powerful computer.
body:
# Mars' Moderate Modpack
This modpack aims to offer a moderately modded experience without requiring a powerful computer, and is intended to be used on a server to have an enjoyable experience with friends. It includes a variety of exciting mods, such as the incredible Terralith and Incendium mods for brand new terrain generation, the game-changing Create mod, many mods such as Handcrafted and Chipped that add countless new options to decorate and detail builds, and perhaps most importantly, the Blahaj mod, which brings the best plush ever into the game! There are also a bunch of quality of life and performance mods, to make sure everyone gets as enjoyable an experience.

# Attribution
The following mods have been added directly to the modpack as they aren't available on modrinth. They are all released under licenses allowing this (MIT/LGPL).

Controlling: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controlling

INMIS: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inmis

LOOTR: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lootr-fabric

Servux: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/servux

# Disclaimer
This modpack is primarily developed to be used on Clean_Mars' follower SMP, but anyone is free to use the pack as they want. We will try to offer support if we can, but there is no guarantee we will be able to help if your purpose is wildly different to ours (however you are free to use this pack as a base if you want).
